steps.title: Map the three parts
steps.content: The text first gives a broad statement about Mendez's long career and its phases. It then describes a transition after his travel in the early 1930s. Finally, it explains how that transition appears in specific buildings and stylistic features.

steps.title: Reject distorted structures
steps.content: Choice A adds a claim about Mendez's influence. Choice C compares him with earlier architects rather than his own earlier work. Choice D mentions a later shift but misses the final explanation of how the shift is evident in his work through design details. The answer is B.
